reviews.review_description:
The game is 100% completable (upgrade Gold and Power to lv. 10/ 11) in just a 10 minute session even if you take your time, and the game gets tedious and dull before that point honestly. 
This is no more than a free mobile game that they are actually charging you money for, with zero plans to build on it any further from the looks of it (they literally didn't even add ANY basic sounds or even music of any kind for any part of the game.. just complete and utter silence.). 
So save your money, no matter how little it seems, and get something free that will give just as much/ more game than this offers...
